title: Switch · New component
content:
The switch is a new component in Green Design System for toggling a setting on or off.

It works like a physical switch, one tap turns it on, another turns it off. Use it when a change should take effect immediately, without a confirm button.

## Sizes

Switch comes in two sizes: **large** (the default) and **small**. Use small in dense layouts where space is tight.

## Label placement

The label can sit to the left or right of the toggle, giving you flexibility to match your layout without extra wrappers.

## States

Switch supports on, off, and disabled, including a disabled-on state for when a setting is locked but still needs to communicate its current value.

## Form-ready

Switch works in forms out of the box. It submits its value when on and nothing when off, matching how a native checkbox behaves, so it fits naturally into any form setup.

---

Switch is available in Figma and documented at seb.io/component/switch.
